name: loop-engineering
description: Design, operate, verify, recover, and empirically improve durable agent loops.

interface.shortDescription: Verified, durable agent loops with controlled strategy evolution
interface.longDescription: Use Loop-Engineering to decide when a recurring agent loop is appropriate, design its contract, run bounded iterations, independently verify results, persist state, recover failures, and improve task strategy through matched benchmarks.
defaultPrompt: Design a safe recurring agent loop for this task.
Review this loop contract and find unsafe gaps.
Build a benchmark-gated strategy evolution loop.
